subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond the mention and comprehension of all peoples, befitteth and beseemeth the Lord of Eternity, Who through the effulgent rays of the Orb of His Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و ادراک امم مالک قدم را لایق و سزاست که باشراقات انوار نیر اسم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement
